blog_title: ₹50K vs ₹3 Lakh DTF Printer — Real Cost Difference for Indian Print Business
caption:
₹50K printer broke in 3 months. Cost him ₹25 per piece. The ₹3 lakh one? ₹8-10 per piece, 3x faster 🖨️

Here's the math: cheap looks good until volume hits. Under 15 pieces daily, fine. Over 50? You're losing ₹2.5 lakh in 6 months on waste + downtime.

We see this weekly. Printers skip the volume calculation, buy cheap, then panic.

Save this if you're choosing your first DTF setup 👇
